subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — it's great to hear from you, and the potential synergy you've described sounds genuinely interesting.

I'd be happy to arrange an introductory call. Here are three slots that work on our end:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let me know which of these works best for you and I'll get a calendar invite sent over.

Regarding your request for internal contact details (CTO, VP of Engineering, etc.) — I'm not able to share our internal directory or direct contact information. If the conversation progresses and a senior-level introduction makes sense, we'll be happy to facilitate that through the appropriate channels at the right time.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Agent, Company
